{"analysis":"Found the zip entry for launchcode.txt in the dat file. The zip local file header shows it's stored (uncompressed), 33 bytes. I can see `PASSWORD=8XDP5Q2RT9Z` as readable text. The second half appears to contain binary/non-printable characters that might actually be part of the password. Let me look at the second launchcode.txt entry at offset 3145801 and also get the full raw data.","plan":"1. Examine the second launchcode.txt entry at offset 3145801
2. Try to extract the zip properly - there may be two entries
3. Also look at raw hex around both PASSWORD= locations","commands":[{"keystrokes":"dd if=/app/varsea/disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat bs=1 skip=1048576 count=200 2>/dev/null | od -A x -t x1z
